query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_vendas, 
       COUNT(CASE WHEN brokerVendedor IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_vendedor,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN brokerAngariador IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as com_angariador
FROM sales;
